The '''''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War''''' '''trade paperback''' is a graphic novel collecting all six issues in the ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War]]'' comic series. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] in [[July]] [[1996]].

{{Comics-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''To become a Jedi, it is not the Force one must learn to control but ''oneself''. Ulic Qel-Droma has spent a lifetime learning to control the Force. But now, having tasted power, Qel-Droma cannot fight the dark hunger inside him...''
